segments.text: Today's puja is very important for us.
You all have got your Self-realization,
you've had the knowledge that it necessary to give realizations
To others
We need know what we already have
That' s very important
Because if do not try our hand
And If Do Not Try To Give Realizations To Others
Firstly, you will have no faith in yourself.
You'll have not self-esteem also
The second part is that
we try giving vibrations to other persons
but don't get involved with the person
I've seen some people getting too much involved
If they give realization one person
They think their done a great job
and start working on this person
his family, and relations.
So so far as you must have learned that one may be related or closer to a person but not
necessarily he will get the chance of self-realization only way is collective there's no other
out. If people think that by staying away from ashrams, alone living somewhere they
will achieve much –that's not the way Sahaja Yoga is meant! Formerly
People used to go Himalayas and most of them were separated
And only one or two persons where chosen for spiritual growth
Here it is not question of spiritual growth,
It's a question
Of your collectivity growing in you.
That Is how
You become
A person who
Is collective
Who enjoys collective
Who works on collective
And lives with collective
Such a person develops
New kind
Of powers
And these powers are such that they're very subtle, but the penetrate into any molecule
atom or human beings anywhere.
and their penetration is only possible if you have a temperament which collective without
Without being fully collective, you cannot achieve that height which is very necessary
today for Sahaja Yoga.
As You know there are problems and problem all over as if we feel the world going to
sink especially when I went America felt my goodness this a hell they have created
It's just a hell, because they have no Dharma.
They don't believe in any dharma – completely
their worship adharma and this kind of climate
is flowing all over the world you get
reaction from American Adharmic life
And people think there nothing wrong with it
Whatever we may tell them
They will not believe, nor they'll think that there's any worth in it.
But don't see the destruction from very basis of their life –
Their families and societies
The whole country I feel is filled with such ugly type
Of Adharmi nature
that one cannot even imagine how such ideas came into their heads.
And these ideas I need not tell you,
You know them very well
but if have to save your children
–you've got be an ideal guru yourself
If just talk of Sahaja Yoga
and try assume
that you are a Sahaja Yogi, also try to propagate Sahajyoga without all these powers being
awakened in You. It would be failure! So how do develop this power within us we should
see?
It's rather embarrassing for Me tell How have to behave towards your Guru. I think
people told but naturally spontaneously as soon get your realization and grow in
Naturally you develop a very humble attitude, also an attitude through which
You achieve lots of qualities
Now supposing the Guru is at particular height and if
If you try to go onto the same height, nothing will move towards it.
So You must sit at a place which is much lower than the gurus'.
Some people take too advantage of My good nature I should say and so many
have pointed out me that we must correct these
they talk to you on equal level and all that.
I said, They will learn a lesson!
There we'll learned the lesson
but sometimes it doesn't work out
And then start talking in same manner as if
You are talking with your friend
or to your equally
First is complete humility
We have be humble person, extremely humble
Now check one day
When u talk others
Are U Humble?
When you think of others, are You humble?
Then look after your wife and children. Are You humble?"
That's a very important thing for every person who thinks he is a guru
Humility in the first quality or I should say ocean
into which we must jump
Some people that if they're humble mother then
people will take advantage of you.
Nobody can take advantage
because,you have to remember another point
that You are protected all the time
looked after by Param Chaitanya
I know ,You Know That
but how many really believe
there is Param Chaitanya with us?
If u really believe
There Is Param Chaitanya
then
U don't get frightened
U Don' t Get worried
You are not subjected to all kinds of nonsensical ideas also.
But if you think that you're not protected, what will happen?
How things happened then Param Chaitanya leaves your home
.You have see the whole drama how Param Chaitanya works out
How it works out, how you are behaving.
Supposing your not in a proper shape and try to show off too much then what happens?
Then get the reward for that I do anything but the Paramchaitanya which will teach
That's your lesson that you will remember,
and it should have been a little different from what we are doing.
After all why did We come to Sahaja Yoga?
Begin at the root of It!
We came here because
we wanted know the Absolute Truth
And this Absolute Truth has now been known
through Your vibrations
You know it through your vibrations what is the Absolute Truth and you should work everything
on that line, that absolute truth whatever you feel all your vibrations.
You have to follow but unfortunately I've seen many people think their vibrations
are alright they're alright
and whatever they are receiving on their vibrations is first class.
Now how to correct that point, it's very difficult
It comes from ego
When you have Ego
You can never find anything wrong with your
And even if the Vibrations
Are telling something
Its might be somebody else who is saying something
Because we're not there
Your Ego Is There
And your ego is just spoiling you and teaching
things which normally,
You would see clearly that I am doing something wrong.
–I should not have done it!
In this process of correction
an improvement
when you indulge
we shall say are getting subtler or grosser?
That's the best way to judge
Now i've seen people who go on
on small things like vibrations, whether this vibration are all right or not in the tree
–or of these flowers-
Or one this land.
All kinds material thing they want to see the vibrations
But for what you're seeing the vibration?
You've seen vibration because some sort of a material gain
You think that if you check the vibrations and the vibrations are all right, then we
have quite safe.
We'll not lose this – will not loose'that'.
It's true because vibrations aren't meant to judge these worldly things or worldly
matters it is absolutely cheapening the vibration .You should not cheapen them
Because vibrations can suggest things,
which may be detrimental to your growth very much.
Once I wanted somebody
go somewhere so he said
–I didn't want Mother.
And why?
because the vibrations were bad
and that's what I asked you
If the vibrations are good
What was going there
That is a reason I ask You
So we could help
But before that you judged yourself, judged your vibrations and then you didn't want
to go.
So what happens?
We wanted have an easy cozy life!
And all our problems must be solved by Sahaja Yoga otherwise we think Sahaj yoga
is of no use – whatever it's our desire should be fulfilled so now the desires
are mostly personal.
My child is not well, so the child should be all right
my husband's misbehaving
The Husband Should Be All Right
or I have no house
So i must get a House
See how we're moving our mind
It still on very consumer society as they call it
We've been thinking now
I should have a son now instead of
and you get the son, then blame Sahaja Yoga for that.
Anything
according to your desire doesn't work out
Then it's Sahajyoga which has done harm
And suffering because of sahaja yoga
or this faith in sahaja yoga gets little moving
Or we can say
It is not deep
But if you are deeply embedded in Sahaja Yoga, then what happens?
What may come I will be a Sahajyoga.
Supposing somebody dies – normally is Sahaja Yoga
it's difficult for people to die also we must tell You
even If they want To Die They can't die
Is the Param Chaitanya which decides for them
but supposing
You take up a position like that, still you must know
but the wish may not be fulfilled.
If it is not fulfilled then
if you feel disturbed and think what's wrong
But your wish
Is NOT the wish of God Almighty
While Param Chaitanya
IS THE WISH
OF
GOD ALMIGHTY
Now for example I went to America
Take It Like This
And America attacked Me, negativity and troubled me for all these days I have suffered so-called
–and had pain.
Had all kinds of things but that i've to do because now the American Sahaja Yogis
will realize how much one has payed make this dumb head of Americans to rise?
How stupid they are and how foolish
They're who were enamoured by people
Who are taking money.
So many came to Me
And told me, Mother if you start
Saying that this I can give for three hundred dollars
You'll get thousand and thousand of disciples
Of yours. I said there will not be my disciples
If the come
for money, thinking that because I'm taking money it is worthy something.
That means they are absolutely stupid!
Sahaja Yoga you cannot get in by money – this the first principle they don't understand
most of them…
Most have then do not understand that we can self-realization without paying any
There were some Gujarati rich people in New Jersey and they ask questions to Sahaja Yogis
that, how is it possible get so easily?
It's not possible because this very difficult thing all the Shastras have said.
Everybody has said – a very difficulty your realization!
All right if-so… How you are giving us so easy? Why?
Nobody knew how to answer these people.
You should have said like this or all right,
it is difficult – very difficult
and you cannot give mass through
but if somebody's doing it then
we'll think about that
How someone was doing?
So the kind of stupid questions
are there
And still they go on
We really tell them in a humble way
Sir one has be worthy also
so they will run after people
who are just making money out of them,
making fooloutofthem and they boast
we have three gurus. Somebody says
thatwe're seven Gurus
but I wonder what must be their condition?
So the peoplewhoare extremely stupid
in Sanskritthey call Mool
People
Who Are
Brainless
Cannot get Their Realization
so give Them Up
If They'Re arguing with you
You Just Give Them up
It's not their right
to argue with you. Their right is to get Realization, but not a right
To argue with You ask You foolish questions and stupid question
But we should always remember that
With the humility
We must have our dignity intact
Because
Once
You know
One thing
Should be there
That
You will not behave like a joker all
The time
Your behavior
Will be dignified
At the same time, it would be very pleasant face
or a pleasant personality.
It won't be annoying type
Your personality itself will suggest
that there's something special about you
Now how do we develop
That kind of a personality?
The biggest problem in West is ego
and the biggest problem
In East
Is superego
now this ego business
I don' know from where
has come
In all walk of life they show how egoistical there are.
For example, I went to America and was surprised
that their is a racial problem
And the blacks are treated in different manner
The whites in a different way
I mean color given by God
Somebody has be black or white
If everybody looks same it will look like regiment
There should some variety
There should be some change in the face and also,
In expression one has to a person carrying
better or different expressions.
Otherwise you will bored with such world
where everybody looks same just like that
but so much of racialism there
That I was surprised that how it has worked into human mind.
So as a guru you must develop
complete detest for racialism,
complete detest!
It's very easy to understand
anybody who had fair complexion
could be the cruelest man,
cruelest woman and could
be the cruelest mother also
And the one who is black could be very kind, generous.
It doesn't go with a color – temperament doesn' tgo
but because
blacks have been ill treated so much
that they react and they react naturally
sometimes in such manner
That it's very crude
Very cruel
But this kind of attention
this kind of a, what you can say is wrong type attitude towards human beings.
Even towards animals they won't bear it so toward humans to have such an attitude
itself shows that we are not worthy of Sahaja Yoga at all!
So anyone who has the feeling somebody's black or white cannot be a guru in Sahajyoga.
Then in India we have caste system, equally bad and horrible.
It has no sense it is – there's not basis whatsoever but
In india people who believe that some castes are higher
And other caste are lower
Every caste can do all the worst possible things
There isn't demarcation for them
And every low-caste can be very good
We have had many great poets and Sufis in the lowest caste, this castes are man-made.
You know that a man made cloth doesn't suit us
And all these man-made ideas aren not going to suit
and it will lead us to a great dis… I wouldn't know the description, but
would say – complete destruction. Because hatred begets hatred
And It goes on increasing an increase
If you cannot get rid of your hatred then
are not a Sahaja Yoga. These are all conditionings, you were born in white family so
You're White ,You' re Born In A Christian Family That's Why You Are Christian
We Were Born In A Jew Family that is why we are Jews
All this just because your born in that but does it mean
that you are higher or lower.
All the problems of world today, if you see
is because human attachment
to nonsensical ideas of superiority
only through collective living will change
for example I would say
in an ashram we should have all colored people
living together with equal rights
with the equal understanding and love,
an affection.
If that is not there no use calling it ashram
Once they asked Me Mother
will you come to give a lecture in Harlem?
I said why Not!
So some Sahaja Yogis said Harlem?
Mother do You know what is Harlem?
He says I Know
There's No Harm
They Said Do You Knows The Blacks Are There
I said, �I am also black.� You could call Me Black or you can call Me White.
But the love is such a thing that cleanses all these ridiculous ideas we have about
other people!
To brand anyone as black and white shows that you've no eyes to see any person
with depth. Any person, with loving heart cannot see these superficial things – can
not see! Today is a day where we are celebrating the Guru's greatness… Now look at all
of the Gurus how they were? How They behaved?! We have many in India and many others … many
or these saints that we had, never believed in any caste system.
Never believe black and white Christ He never believed
in Black & White Buddha never believed
In Black And White Nobody believed
Any kind of man-made ideas
These are all man made ideas which
We have accepted
And even after Realization, we try to carry on with it.
Now by saying
We do not get rid of It
but acting we can
Just see how you work out
these stupid ideas within us
and How You Can Get Rid Of Them
Very simple is
in meditation
if you sit down
and see how many people you love,
And why do You Love?
Not out of pity but just with love
How much you care for others.
I've seen some very beautiful examples of that
But still i must say
There are certain fixed ideas
Which have to be dislodged completely
Very important
For every person who is a Guru in Sahaja Yoga
means he has to be a clean-hearted, open hearted, loving hearted fellow.
His heart should play the tune of Param Chaitanya.
If his heart is full up all these man made ideas I don't know what will happen
even when they transplant their hearts
They cannot do it with them manmade
and have use real natural one
So you can imagine when try to take all these odd ideas are just divisive, they will never
give collectivity.
so introspection has be made – Are we one or We are judging each other?
Now the judgment is quite a lot also.
Now all this can be seen only when you live together, otherwise how will we know?
When do start living with each other and discover what is missing in your heart.
What's not there or has to go away from it.
It feels so peaceful having a heart which is full of love
because every movement
of that heart is so much joy, so much joy.
There's a story about Shri Rama
That he ate the bears kind-of fruit
which were first tested by an old lady with such love
I mean shows what?
shows that a person like Shri Ram, who was the king of highest heritage and this old lady
Who is just from lowest caste gives him these fruits with such love.
And when he eats them He starts praising it
So his wife says give me some It's alright
But brother still half way I think in Sahaja Yoga
So he doesn't like. He gets angry, then she eats and says brother-in-law it's a wonderful
fruit I must say!
She said all right give me some, why should i give you now?
First You were very much angry so Why Should I Give These Fruits to Eat?
The story shows that the level of your personality as Guru is judged by Your clean
heart, by your loving-heart – by Your highest remarkable personality.
In the personality it is not something that's to be built in artificially!
It isn't artificial but natural absolutely natural whatever you do has
to be natural. So this artificiality of certain ways
or talking, a certain way is living together creates problem
For example we had an ashram in America
In New York and there was lady who was very strict
everything should tip top it would here the spoons must
there and the folk should be here, all sorts of things.
And she hurt many people – not important!
These cultural… I can call it taboos are not important in Sahaja Yoga because now
you have become a guru — Guru can stay anywhere live anywhere eat anything any
time that's what will happen but also as seen in Sahajyoga they're many who
anxious to eat food as soon it is served.
Once It happened, I was there they had served the food and just then started removing
The plates!
And said what's matter?
Have you eaten?
Oh You haven't not eaten madam?
No i havent touched it even so you see sort of first
Is very lowest type of we should say desire is the hunger now a guru doesn't bother
Whatever you give all right, whatever you want not to give alright.
Even if it don't gave is allright
but one has develop that by killing your ego
people feel very hurt
If we serve them little later than another person
There's a whole kinds of funny things I've seen in Sahaja Yoga
On the contrary
It is the lowest type of, I should say a desire.
We shouldn't be very much catered to if you want
To Be A Real Guru
Of course many problems are solved
As i have seen so far that they do not take
To drugs and they don' t drink
And all such things
This Is Such A Blessing
Because If had to start from That level
I don't know how deep, I would have gone from where I would've pulled you out.
But that is of course a very big thing!
That it quite nice things but still to make beautiful life
Out Of You which will attract the attention
From everyone How we talk?
How behave ? How love?
So again one has say that Guru Pada comes only through
love that you have. Like they'll say ten people, for anything! For a drama suppose
here and if it's only from particular country or form of the group then there is no fun
–there isn't any fun- .For example ,they will have music group so
from the particular one caste could be, or would
have been one religion. Could be you can say
school of anything so that shows
we are still not there as a guru
should like every kind
culture, every kind of beauty and that has to be brought in our daily life.
We should not look down upon anyone for their color or their race , status class consciousness
all this have been shown on the lives of all these guru saints who lived.
Tukaramah says, O God thank god you have made me a schedule caste.
He was not but he just say so!
All of us all the time should be conscious what has been our birth?
What is being personality or big name one shouldn't able to make out it who
is the saint and who he's not.
Even people are proud that they're saints, I was surprised in America also very much
that the Russians who have gone there are a very different quality people.
They wouldn't raise their eyes to Me,
they would not raise Their Eyes and were very deep
–very-very deeply. Vibrations where very deep
The reason is I think
uh..they had been oppressed
during communism perhaps maybe
And now ,They've come
To America
Where they seen so called freedom
and what nonsense it is doing, so knowing these two extremes I think they have gone
very deep into their own being.
And there are such strength as such unity among themselves!
I was surprised that I had never met them before, they didn't come from Russia.
They came only –they were there!
So what is it?
That has kept the like-that
Is
that they had no religion in their heads.
They have no religion, to them every religion is the same
and there has been a new religion to follow
so a guru cannot belong any religion
because these religions are also man-made
–they've created such problem all over
And we're fighting among themselves
How can be divine?
So you should not get involved into some sort of a religious bias – I have seen it, that
a Sahaja Yogi say if he is Christian then the bias will be shown.
That He's a Christian we can make It out!
If He' s a Jew You Can Make It Out!
So, what's the use of coming to Sahaja Yoga?
Their attention if it goes inside they'll find out.
You have to dissect yourself – you see what is wrong with your and why is that
are not very successful as a guru!
The success of the Guru he doesn't bother about time every time in holy times for
He's not bothered if somebody is late or has come early.
he' snot a slave of watches and time,
this also man-made there were no watches about I think 300 years back
And nobody was so particular
About the timing
So first thing
He is beyond time, Kala Teeth as you call it.
Then he's also Guna teetha.
Guna teetha means
that doesn't belong to the left side or
right-side of center
–he' sbeyond these three
beyond this gunas
where
she stands and sees
everything in divine light
Everything
If something good happens
to him, said the Divine light has done it.
If something bad happens to Him he says that the Divine Light wanted this way – everything
He leaves for divine light is beyond the gunas like supposing there's a person who
is on the right side, egoistical.
Then he'll start saying how is it?
I wanted this and that didn't work out
or how… He will challenge
Another who starts crying
The left sided one
That i am very sorry
This has happened to me
It should not have happen at all
Or in center also
She might think
How far are my vibrations
And so could I know
But a person
who is a real guru, he looks at it as drama – just a witness of the drama.
It happened…it was to happen so that has happened!
Now what do we get out if this? We'll you something
The lesson
That This Was Not Right or This Was Wrong
Thats all
For that moment not go on churning in your head
That's all one gets, and he is not bothered about anything else.
So He goes beyond his gunas – beyond guna He lives!
…He eats anywhere, sleeps everywhere…
...he isn't bothered where He lives...
..He doesn' t bother whether by car or by bullock cart..
He doesn't feel he's being not honoured if they give him a garland of few flowers.
But, he is not bothered because nothing can enhance his personality – nothing!
You gave them something simple it was all right or even you don' t want to do anything
its alright.
It isnot that he judges himself through your eyes but he judges himself though his
own eyes, and he sees for himself the joy of enjoying himself.
What is there to be so particular about anything?
what it's great to be hankering after any thing?
It just works out in its' on time
And if doesn't ,it does not
What does it matter? Just think of It.
Also in Sahaja Yoga a guru has to be
binding force, there are two types
people as here which go on breaking relations
its very easy for them they gone complaining
but their others who have the power
bind together
In such manner and sweet manner
that the people are brought closer together.
Not, they have to forgive
it automatically works out like this
just work's-outlikethat
and
People go on joining such a man
I was surprised in America there were
very few Sahaja Yogis
We spent they said fifty thousand dollars
And got
Fifty
Sahajyogis
One Thousand for one
one Sahaja Yogi in America. So very bad shape, but still you see we have to hope for them
because there are lots of seekers and losts is the wilderness of seeking
But I thought that maybe it's a circle they had pass through this circle of stupidity
and then definitely they will see the point.
And it has happened!
We had about four thousand people for My lecture,
which never have happen there in that country
Nobody got such a lot of audience as They said
but still not many came
But their realization
So I think gradually
Even in America it may start going, and the Sahaja Yogis must not only worry about their
houses where they live but go all out to them. I would say some of those Sahajogis who
could afford should go to America workout this outside world maybe if there are outsiders
who come and talk about Sahaja Yoga, they might be impressed.
There are so many false gurus that you can't count them
And They have accepted Them
It's very surprising
though they've suffered
lost in money everything
still they're accepted after all He is our Guru
So there basically something wrong with their brains
That don´t understand what to expect
I have written one book, perhaps it may reach them but in any case you all can write your
experiences and things. And if they publish maybe
It might help to open their eyes
While writing anything
You should remember that
To show the quality of Sahaja Yoga
How you are
In this way
One shouldn't feel
that you are putting them down or trying to say some things which will hurt them, but
saying it in such a manner – then corrects and helps.
For the guru is important he should not have any false ideas about himself
He might be from poor family
might be from the rich family, whatever it is.
He should not conscious of that because once you become that
see look at Kabira he was just a weaver
Look at Tridas
.He Was Just A
what do You call That?
Shoemaker
See in India these are very low caste supposed to be
,he has written beautiful poetry
then Nama Deva
he was a tailor. Just think of that! All these people have written the same thing with such
great beauty and poetry – how they achieved? Because now, we've entered into this great
realm of spirituality." You also write some very good poetry I know but some
All the people who have written Guru poetry turned out to be very obstinate, very egoistical
peoples.
This is something I couldn't understand – you are writing here beautiful poetry
and there your full of ego so from where this poetry's coming God knows!
So first off all it was yourself…your personality has been something that people
should say, this is the real guru we have met.
For that you know very well
You don't need to give up your family
Don' t haveto givep anything
But ego if it's still there
I do not whatto say
butyou must get rid ofit completely
and collectively also
Ego shoud be driven out
Collectively
It''s a thing
That people are
egoistical secretly within themselves
But sometimes it shows, it's a very subtle nonsensical disease that people have and they
just indulge into.
On this day of Guru Puja I've to say now
That one has work really hard
Very Hard
The most important thing is how much you have dedicated your life
Your time
To Sahaja Yoga
then only you will achieve that state of guru.
Look at Me, I am a housewife
and have my family's responsibilities problems
but despite that
i'm all the time thinking about Sahaja Yogis
Sahaj Yoga
And All
That is this emancipation
Of human beings in whole world
Not Only here or there
In The Whole World
So that should be your widened vision, not for only
Your school college or university
Or this ofthat. But a very wider
Vision one shoud have and
That you've to develop through
You're working into every time
Of circumstances ,every type
Of problems you had . Once
Once you develop that kind of a personality, then
You'll be amazed how can help so many people.
I know there are so many Sahaja Yogis here who are worthy
Of praise and really
Love them very much but one should
Always see as you are now
Going to the gurus
You have to be careful not to think that you are a guru.
We should never thing we're gurus already,
once start thinking again ego the guru comes up
so one's decide I'm nothing
and just little ripple in heart of my mother
if such humble feeling you get
then all your problems can be solved
And things will work out because your attention and your behaviour is going to impress other
people.
Nothing else, whatever you may try it's You who are gonna get Sahaja Yoga further
there so much said about how become a good guru all that but I think i'll keep
